subject: Order not delivered after 2 hours – diapers urgently needed

conversation.body: Hi, I placed an order for Pampers size 3 at 7:12 PM and it said 30 minutes delivery. It has been more than 1.5 hours now and nothing has been delivered. My baby needs the diapers right now. Please help.
Hi Priya! I'm really sorry to hear this. Let me check the status of your order right away. Can you please share your order ID?
Order ID is OZI-20394. Please hurry, this is an emergency.
Thank you. I can see your order is currently in 'packing' status. I'm escalating this to our delivery team to prioritize immediately. You should receive an update within the next 20 minutes.
It has been 30 more minutes and still nothing. The app still shows packing. This is completely unacceptable. I ordered from you because it said 30 min delivery.

I sincerely apologize Priya. I have flagged this as urgent. The packing team is running behind today. A rider will be assigned in the next 10 minutes. I'm adding a ₹100 store credit to your account for the inconvenience.
I don't want store credit, I need the diapers. Please either deliver or let me cancel so I can go buy them somewhere else.
Your order has been assigned to a rider now and should reach you within 30 minutes. I'm really sorry for the wait.
Finally received at 9:28 PM. That is 2 hours 16 minutes. Your 30 min delivery is a lie. I had to borrow from my neighbor in the meantime.

subject: Baby formula delivered 90 minutes late

conversation.body: Hello, ordered Aptamil formula at 11:30. App said 35 mins. It's been almost 1 hour. No update in the app. What is happening?
Hi Ankit, sorry for the delay. Let me check order OZI-20411 for you.
I can see the order was packed but the rider had a minor issue. He is on his way now and should reach in 20-25 minutes. Again, very sorry for the inconvenience.
Ok. Is there anything you can do? My son hasn't eaten since morning.
I completely understand. I have added ₹50 credit to your account and will personally monitor this delivery. You should receive it by 1 PM.
Received. Thank you for following up. But please fix your delivery time estimates, they are very inaccurate.

subject: Order still not delivered – 2 hours wait, no update

conversation.body: I ordered baby wipes and rash cream 2 hours ago. App showed 30 mins. Nothing has arrived. No one is updating me. This is so frustrating.
Hi Sunita, I apologize for this. Let me look into your order immediately.
I can see your order OZI-20489 is in the packing stage. We are experiencing higher than usual order volume today. I am escalating this now.
You said escalating 30 minutes ago. Still no movement in the app. Can you just tell me when it will come?
I understand your frustration Sunita. I am checking with the warehouse team now. One moment please.
It has now been 2 hours 5 minutes. I have a rash on my baby and I ordered rash cream for this reason. I am extremely upset. I want to cancel and get a refund.

subject: Delivery taking way too long – promised 30 mins

conversation.body: Order OZI-20531 placed at 8:10 PM for toothpaste and baby soap. Said 30 mins but it's 9 PM and nothing. Can you check?
Hi Rohit! Sorry for the delay. Let me check this for you.
Your order is packed and a rider is being assigned. Should reach you soon.
How long exactly? It's already 9 PM.

subject: Order placed in evening, delivered next afternoon – absolutely unacceptable

conversation.body: I ordered baby food and a set of clothes at 6:30 PM on March 10. The expected delivery time was 8:00 PM. It did not arrive at 8 PM, not at 10 PM, not even at midnight. I got a WhatsApp message at 7 AM saying my number was not reachable which is completely false. My phone was on the whole night. The order was finally delivered at 2:15 PM on March 11 – nearly 20 hours later. This is outrageous for a company that promises 30-minute delivery. I was also promised sorry coupons but have received nothing.

Dear Deepika, we sincerely apologize for this terrible experience. This is not the standard we hold ourselves to at OZi. I can see your order OZI-20558 did suffer a significant delay due to a warehouse staff shortage that evening. We are applying ₹200 store credit to your account immediately. The sorry coupons will be issued within 24 hours. We understand your frustration completely.
It has now been 48 hours since you promised the sorry coupons. Still nothing. You keep making promises and not keeping them. This is the last time I am using Ozi.

subject: 45 minute delay on diaper order – at least resolved

conversation.body: Hi, my order OZI-20420 for Huggies diapers was supposed to arrive in 30 mins but it's been 45 mins now. Any update?
Hi Kavita, I apologize for the delay. The rider got held up in traffic near Sector 14. He is 10 minutes away now.
Okay. Please make sure this doesn't happen regularly. I order frequently.
Absolutely understood. I am adding a 15% discount coupon to your account for your next order. Order should arrive in under 10 minutes now.
Received. The rider was polite. Thank you.

subject: No rider assigned for over 1.5 hours – still showing packing

conversation.body: Order OZI-20601 showing 'packing' for 1.5 hours now. No rider assigned. App ETA keeps updating itself. What is going on?

Hi Manish, I can see the delay. We are short on riders in your zone at the moment. Your order is packed and ready, we just need a rider to pick up. I expect this to be assigned within the next 15-20 minutes.
You said 15-20 minutes. It has been 30 minutes. Still the same status. I need to know if I should just go buy it myself or wait more.

subject: Order arrived 15 mins late but all good

conversation.body: Hi, ordered at 9:15 and it's 9:55 now. Still haven't received. App says 30 min delivery.
Hello Neha! I see the rider is 5 minutes away from your location. Morning hours can sometimes have slight delays. Really sorry about this.
Oh okay, received just now. It was only a 15-minute delay, not a big deal. Just wanted to check.
Glad it arrived! We will work on being more punctual. Thank you for your patience.

subject: Waiting for callback – order delayed and no agent available

conversation.body: Called support 3 times in the last hour. No one picks up. Placed order at 4 PM, it is 5 PM now and I see the ETA on the app keeps getting pushed. I need someone to call me back at 9876543210.
Hi Vikram, I can see the missed call logs. I'm sorry our phone lines were busy. I am scheduling a callback for you within the next 30 minutes and I'll also personally check on your order OZI-20648.

subject: ETA changed 4 times in 1 hour – zero transparency

conversation.body: App showed 30 mins at order time. Then 45. Then 60. Now showing 75 mins. My order OZI-20672 has been 'packed' for 1 hour with no rider. What is happening? Why does your ETA change every 10 minutes?

Hi Shweta, I completely understand your frustration with the ETA changes. The system updates automatically based on rider availability. We are currently low on riders in your sector. I sincerely apologize for the misleading estimates.
This is terrible. I ordered diapers and baby formula. My baby is almost 10 months old. If you cannot deliver in 30 mins you should not promise 30 mins. I want to cancel this order.

subject: Refund not processed – agent stopped responding

conversation.body: I want a refund for order OZI-20350. The product I received was opened and partially used. I raised a complaint 2 days ago and no one has responded.
Hi Aarti, I'm really sorry to hear this. That is completely unacceptable. Can you share a photo of the received product? I will initiate the refund right away once confirmed.
I have sent the photos on the email you gave me 2 days ago. Please check.
Let me check with our quality team. One moment.
Hello? Are you still there? It has been 1 hour.

subject: Agent said 'checking' and never came back – order status unknown

conversation.body: My order OZI-20480 was placed at 8:30 PM. It is now 9:30 PM and still showing 'order accepted'. No packing, no rider. Can you check what's going on?
Hi Rajan! Sorry for the inconvenience. Let me check the status of your order right now.
Ok thanks. Waiting.
Hello? It has been 10 minutes and you have not responded. I can see you are 'online' but not replying.
This is the second time this has happened to me. Agent disappears mid conversation. I am going to leave a 1 star review.

subject: Phone lines not answered – chat agent also disappeared

conversation.body: I called your support number 4 times in the last 2 hours. No one picks up. I then started a chat. The agent said hi and then just disappeared. My baby's formula is out of stock suddenly in the app after I already paid. I want either the product or a full refund immediately.
Hi Pooja! I am so sorry about this experience. Let me check your order OZI-20510 right now and we will make this right.
Please do not disappear again like the last agent. I am watching the chat.
Of course! I'm here. Looking at your order now...
You have been typing for 30 minutes. What is happening?

subject: Ticket auto-closed without resolution – follow up needed

conversation.body: I raised ticket TKT-20519 about a wrong product delivered 3 days ago. Today I received an automated email saying my ticket has been resolved and closed. Nobody contacted me. No refund was given. No replacement was sent. How can you close a ticket without even talking to me?

Dear Suresh, I apologize for the confusion. The ticket was incorrectly auto-closed by our system. I am reopening it now and will personally handle your case. Please give me until end of day to get back to you with a resolution.
It is end of day and I have heard nothing from you again. This is a pattern with your support team.

subject: Requesting escalation – no supervisor available

conversation.body: I have been going back and forth with your support team for 3 days about a defective product. No resolution. I need to speak to a supervisor or manager immediately.
Hi Rashmi, I understand your frustration. Let me check if a supervisor is available to take your case.
I'm sorry, our supervisors are currently on other calls. I have flagged this as urgent. A supervisor will contact you within 2 hours.
That is what the last agent said 6 hours ago. I am going to file a consumer complaint if this is not resolved today.

subject: No response on 2-day-old complaint about missing item

conversation.body: I emailed 2 days ago about an item missing from my order OZI-20310 – I ordered 3 products and only 2 were in the bag. Nobody has replied to my email. Raising this ticket as a follow up.
Day 3. Still no response. I've emailed, raised a ticket, and WhatsApped your business number. Complete silence.

subject: Support eventually resolved after second ticket – very poor experience

conversation.body: My refund for order OZI-20440 has not come through in 5 days. I have already raised a ticket which was closed without resolution.
Hi Meena, I sincerely apologize. I can see the previous ticket was incorrectly closed. Let me reinitiate the refund now.
Please make sure this one is not closed automatically again.
I have personally escalated this and kept it open. Refund should reflect within 3-5 business days.
Finally got the refund. But it took 2 weeks and 3 support interactions. This is too much effort for a customer.

subject: Ordered Pampers size 3 – received Huggies size 2

conversation.body: I ordered Pampers size 3 for my 8-month-old. I received Huggies size 2. These are completely different products. My baby cannot use size 2 diapers. I need the correct product or a refund.
Hi Pallavi, I sincerely apologize for this picking error. This should not have happened. Can I confirm – do you want a replacement of the correct product or a refund?
I need the correct product as soon as possible. And please pick up the wrong product.
Noted. I have raised a replacement request. The correct Pampers size 3 will be delivered tomorrow morning and our rider will collect the wrong product at the same time. No need to come to any store.
Received replacement on March 5 at 11 AM. Replacement was correct this time. Thank you for the resolution but it should not have gone wrong in the first place.

subject: Baby shampoo ordered but received adult hair oil

conversation.body: I ordered Johnson's Baby Shampoo and received a bottle of Parachute coconut oil. This is not even close to what I ordered. My order ID is OZI-20521. I want this escalated and resolved today.
Hi Nidhi! I am really sorry about this. That is a significant picking error. I will initiate a return pick-up and replacement. Can I confirm your delivery address is still Sector 78, Noida?
Yes that is correct. When will the replacement come?
I am checking availability for the baby shampoo. One moment.
It has been over an hour with no update again. I am going to leave a 1 star review.

subject: Received used and opened product – unacceptable quality check

conversation.body: I ordered a baby monitor worth ₹3500 from Ozi. When the package arrived it was clearly re-taped and when I opened it the product had been used – there were fingerprints on the screen and the charging cable was frayed. This is completely unacceptable. I want a full refund and I want to understand how you are selling used products as new.

Dear Gaurav, I am deeply sorry for this experience. We have strict quality checks in place and this should never have happened. I am escalating this immediately to our quality team and initiating a full refund. A pick-up will be arranged at your convenience.
The pick-up happened on March 11 and I received the refund to my original payment method. However, I want to know how this got through your quality checks. I am not comfortable ordering again.
We understand your concern. This was an isolated incident and we are investigating. We have taken corrective action with the warehouse team. We hope to earn your trust back.

subject: Ordered Lego Duplo blocks, received a different toy brand

conversation.body: Ordered Lego Duplo Classic Box for my 3 year old as a birthday gift. Received some off-brand blocks in a similar box. The product inside is completely different. Order OZI-20630.
Hi Sonal, this is really unfortunate and I completely understand. I am raising a replacement request right now. The correct Lego Duplo set should be delivered by tomorrow.
Please confirm when the replacement is dispatched. The birthday is day after tomorrow.
I have flagged this as urgent due to the time sensitivity. I'll send you a WhatsApp update once dispatched.

subject: Extra cash collected by rider – no invoice in app

conversation.body: Your delivery person collected ₹750 from me in cash. My order total showed ₹620 in the app. When I asked for a receipt he said the company will send it on the app. Nothing has come on the app. No invoice, no breakdown. I want to know where the extra ₹130 went and I want a proper receipt.
Hi Sameer, this is very concerning. I want to look into this immediately. Can you share your order ID and confirm the rider's name if you have it?
Order ID is OZI-20498. The rider's name was Arun as per the app. I do not understand why there is no invoice feature in the app. Even small kirana shops give receipts.
I am escalating this to our payments and operations team immediately. If there has been any unauthorized collection we will refund the difference within 24 hours. I apologize for this.
It has been 48 hours. No refund, no invoice, no response. This feels like a scam.

subject: No cancel button in app – delivery delayed and I want to cancel

conversation.body: My order OZI-20588 is 1.5 hours late. I don't need it anymore. I went and bought from the chemist. I want to cancel the order but there is NO cancel button anywhere in the app. The chat was open with a support person who just vanished. Now I have started a new chat. Please cancel immediately and refund.
Hi Nisha, I am so sorry about this. I have cancelled the order OZI-20588 from our end. Since the order was not delivered, a full refund will be processed within 5-7 business days.
Why is there no cancel option in the app at all? This is a basic feature. If the delivery is late I should be able to cancel myself without having to wait for a support agent.
That is very valid feedback and I have noted it for our product team. Currently cancellations can only be done through support. We are working to improve this.

subject: Wanted to cancel order but had to wait 45 mins for agent

conversation.body: I placed order OZI-20642 by mistake – I meant to order size L but ordered size M baby clothes. I immediately opened the app to cancel but there is no cancel button. I opened chat support and waited 45 minutes for an agent. By the time they responded the order was already packed.

Hi Hitesh, I am sorry for the wait and for the frustration. Since the order is already packed we cannot stop it from being delivered. However, once you receive it you can raise a return request and we will arrange a free pick-up and refund.
This is very inconvenient. I should be able to cancel within a few minutes of placing an order, especially if it has not even started packing. Other apps have this feature. Why doesn't Ozi?

subject: Stuck in a loop – chat open, no agent, cannot cancel

conversation.body: My order OZI-20700 has been delayed by over 1 hour. I need to cancel it. There is no cancel button in the app. I started a chat with support, the agent said they are checking the status, then disappeared. Now the chat is still showing as 'open' with that agent so I cannot start a new chat. I am completely stuck. How do I cancel???
Is there any other way to contact you? WhatsApp? Email? This is absolutely ridiculous. My baby is sleeping and I placed this order for tonight. I do not need it now.

subject: App shows serviceable in Delhi but order cannot be placed

conversation.body: Main Delhi mein rehta hoon, South Extension. App download kiya, product bhi select kiya, but checkout pe bol raha hai 'service not available in your area'. App pe toh kuch nahi likha tha ki Delhi mein service nahi hai. Bahut frustrating hai.

Hi Amit, I'm sorry for the confusion. Currently OZi services are available only in select areas of Gurgaon and Noida. We are actively working on expanding to Delhi very soon. I understand how frustrating it must be to get this far in the app only to find out it does not serve your area.
Then why does the app let me add products and go all the way to checkout without telling me it doesn't work in Delhi? This wastes so much time. Please add a serviceability check at the beginning.
That is very valid feedback Amit. I have passed this to our product team. We hope to serve Delhi very soon and will notify you when we do.

subject: Mumbai location shows serviceable on splash screen but fails at checkout

conversation.body: I saw Ozi advertised as a quick commerce app for baby products. I am in Bandra, Mumbai. I downloaded the app, saw products I liked, added them to cart, and at checkout it said 'unserviceable'. Why does your app not show upfront that it only works in two cities? I spent 20 minutes browsing only to find I cannot order.

Dear Farida, we apologize for the inconvenience. OZi currently operates only in Gurgaon and Noida. We are working on adding more cities soon including Mumbai. We will make our serviceability coverage clearer in the app experience to avoid this confusion. Thank you for the feedback.

subject: Diapers on Ozi more expensive than local pharmacy – why?

conversation.body: The Pampers 44 count pack is ₹899 on your app. My local medical store has it for ₹780. You charge a premium for the same product. Why should I pay more? The delivery is convenient yes but ₹120 extra every time adds up.

Hi Sanjay, I understand your concern. OZi prices can vary slightly from offline stores as we operate a curated quick delivery model. However, we do have subscription plans and offer cashback and discount coupons regularly. May I share how you can save on your next order?
Yes please. I order diapers every 2-3 weeks so if there is a way to save that would be good.

You can use code OZI15 for 15% off on your first order and we are launching a Diaper Subscription plan next month which will give you up to 20% off on regular orders. I'll add your number to be notified first.

subject: Prices too high for middle class – basic baby items unaffordable

conversation.body: Bhut mehnga hai aapka app. Main middle class family se hoon. Baby ka sirf diaper chahiye tha, woh bhi ₹900 se upar. Quantity bhi kam hai pack mein. Ye afford nahi kar sakte middle class wale. Please kuch bundle ya offer laao.

Ritu ji, hum samajhte hain aapki baat. OZi ek aggregator platform hai isliye kaafi brands ke products hain alag alag price mein. Hum affordable options bhi laate hain. Aap 'Sort by Price' karke low price options dekh sakte hain. Aur hum jaldi hi value packs aur bundles launch karne waale hain.
Tab tak toh main kisi aur jagah se khareed lunga. Jab saste products aayein tab bataana.

subject: Demo booking app crashes every time – booked manually but no one came

conversation.body: I am trying to book a product demo for the baby stroller I want to buy. Every time I click 'Book Demo' in the app it shows a loading spinner and then crashes with 'Something went wrong'. I have tried 4 times over 4 days. Different days, different times. Always the same error.

Hi Karan, I apologize for the technical issue. The demo booking feature is experiencing a bug that our tech team is aware of. I am scheduling a demo for you manually. Will Saturday March 9 at 11 AM work for you?
Yes that works. Please confirm.
Confirmed. Our product representative will visit at 11 AM on March 9. You will receive a WhatsApp reminder an hour before.
It is 12:30 PM on March 9. No one came. No reminder either. I waited at home for 1.5 hours. This is very poor service.

Karan, I am extremely sorry. The representative had a last-minute scheduling conflict and it was not communicated to you. This is completely unacceptable. I am rescheduling for March 12 at 11 AM with a senior representative and this will be personally monitored.
Demo happened on March 12 as promised. Representative was knowledgeable. But between the app crashes and the first no-show this whole process took 4 days and 3 support chats. Not a great experience.
